title: ImWhy's modpack
description: A simple mod pack from me that will provide comfort for your game.
body:
## **ImWhy's pvp modpack** 
 A simple mod pack from me, which will provide a **comfortable game**, focusing on the **PvP segment**, with **good combination of mods**, helps in such types of PvP as:

-  CPVP 
-  UHC
-  Swords
-  Axe
-  Netherite Potion
-  SMP


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Also good for vanilla gameplay

</details>


## [How to install modpack?](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/#how-do-i-play-a-)


U have a cool mod for this pack or question about modpack?
- Great! [request](https://discord.gg/x2BfEcQvA4) it
